stemHtml: You are approaching an aerodrome on an RNP APCH to LNAV/VNAV minima using baro-VNAV. The approach has a minimum temperature of -8ºC. The OAT is +10ºC, during final approach, ATC tells you to go around immediately due to loss of terrain separation. What could have happened?

options.a: You made a mistake inputting barometric data.
options.d: Loss of the GNSS signal because of the low satellite elevations above the horizon.
